name: Eggplant Salad with Walnut Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplant lengthwise into 1/2 inch slices.
2. Sprinkle with salt and drain in a colander for 20 minutes.
3. Pat dry with paper towels.
4. Heat oil in a skillet and add eggplant slices, a few at a time. Cook on both sides until golden.
5. Place on paper towels to drain.
6. Combine remaining ingredients except lettuce in a bowl and mix well.
7. Add eggplant slices and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
8. Line serving dish with lettuce leaves.
9. Using a slotted spoon, remove eggplant slices from the dressing.
10. Arrange over lettuce and top with walnuts.
Grenadine makes a sweeter dressing than the wine vinegar.
